Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Added Triage UI — review, reprice, and vendor-sell retainer items with history-based recommendations. Ban items from Scrooge via retainer sell list context menu. GilTrack passive transaction capture from chat.
